name: slides2pdf
title: Slides2pdf
description: Convert PowerPoint and other slides to PDF using Keynote, PowerPoint, or LibreOffice.
author: robert_hofmann

commands.name: convert-to-pdf
commands.title: Convert to PDF
commands.subtitle: Slides2PDF
commands.description: Convert slides and documents to PDF using Keynote, PowerPoint, or LibreOffice.

commands.name: intro2pdf
commands.title: Intro2PDF
commands.subtitle: Slides2PDF
commands.description: Check which conversion engines are installed and get setup help.

preferences.name: openAfterConvertSingle
preferences.title: Open when single file converted
preferences.label: Open after single convert
preferences.description: Open the generated PDF immediately when converting a single selected file.

preferences.name: openAfterConvertBatch
preferences.title: Open when multiple files converted
preferences.label: Open after batch convert
preferences.description: Open all generated PDFs after converting multiple selected files (after all conversions finish).

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
